summary: Reviewed recent commits (merged PR #1 feat/initial-work) and fixed bugs found

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Data race on AdminTokens map: read in adminOnly middleware, written in AdminAuth, no synchronization. Confirmed via go test -race.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added tokensMu sync.RWMutex; guards reads and writes.

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Data race on h.TimeLimit: read under h.mu in loadQuestion(), but written without lock in SetTimer() and read without lock in StartGame() and revealAnswer().
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Writes now guarded by h.mu.Lock(); all reads under h.mu.RLock() or cached after locked read.

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: Supervisor backend service crash-looping: GO_BINARY pointed to /app/backend/quizhub but binary was at /app/quizhub. Caused FileNotFoundError on startup.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed GO_BINARY default to ../quizhub (relative to backend/) with env override QUIZHUB_BINARY; rebuilt /app/quizhub with latest handler fixes.

verification.end_to_end_flow: verified (admin auth, add question, create room, join, start game)
